recommended.song_name: Have You Ever Seen The Rain

content:
Tabbed By E. Jay Apaga
Song: We Belong
Album: Tropico
Artist: Pat Benatar
Written by: Lowen & Navarro

While the other tabs are right I've written this in a different
key that involve more open chords at the neck. It also allows 
you to capo anywhere on the neck to play more easily in whatever 
key fits your voice. Cheers!

(For Original Key Capo at 3)


[Intro]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
We belong, we belong to the light[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Many times Ive tried to tell you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Many times Ive cried alone[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Always Im surprised how well you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Cut my feelings to the bone[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Dont want to leave you really[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]          
Ive invested too much time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
To give you up that easy[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                   [ch]D[/ch]
To the doubts that complicate your mind[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
We belong to the light[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch] 
We belong to the thunder[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]                    
We belong to the sound of the words[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]A[/ch]     
Weve both fallen under[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch] 
Whatever we deny or embrace[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]A[/ch]      
For worse or for better[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]  
We belong, we belong[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]
We belong together[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Maybe its a sign of weakness[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
When I dont know what to say[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Maybe I just wouldnt know[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
What to do with my strength anyway[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Have we become a habit[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch] 
Do we distort the facts[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Now theres no looking forward[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Now theres no turning back[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]

[Chorus]

[Verse]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Close your eyes and try to sleep now[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
